description: §18.8.2 — a `match` whose subject is a STRUCT-typed value (`match p` where `p: Post` is a struct) SHALL fire E-TYPE-024: `match` supports enums, unions, and primitive literals, not structs. Regression guard: matching a whole struct is a category error; the steer is to access a field (`match p.role`) or destructure instead.
rationale: §18.8.2: `match` requires an enum, union, or primitive-literal subject; a struct-typed subject has no variant set to discriminate and is rejected with E-TYPE-024. Use field access (`p.role`) or destructuring.
